arts.ttl: Lazio vs. Fiorentina: a six-pointer for Europe
arts.sum: Fiorentina have won their last two league games against Lazio (in February and September 2024, both at the Franchi by 2-1); the last time the Viola achieved more consecutive wins against the Biancocelesti in Serie A was between December 2006 and March 2008 (four in that case). Lazio are unbeaten in their last eight home league games against Fiorentina (W6 D2), while the Viola`s last away win against the Biancocelesti in Serie A was back on 15th May 2016 (4-2 under Paulo Sousa).
